entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop whose seeds are stored and protected from bruchid damage

entities.name: CALLOSOBRUCHUS MACULATUS
entities.description: A bruchid pest that damages pigeonpea seeds during storage

entities.name: SOLARIZATION
entities.description: The process of exposing seeds in polythene bags to sunlight to increase temperature and kill pests

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The thermal environment affecting the survival of C. maculatus and seed germination

entities.name: GERMINATION
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea seeds to sprout after solarization treatment

entities.name: STORAGE
entities.description: The period during which pigeonpea seeds are kept and protected from damage

entities.name: LABORATORY
entities.description: The controlled environment used as a comparison for solarization

relationships.description: used to protect seeds from damage
kills the pest by increasing temperature
context in which seeds are protected
environment where the pest survived and laid eggs
